violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment is to apply for a RICFSM with RIDOH. Application was printed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026

The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. Establishment is to obtain thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device. New Violation. Correct By: 09/19/2025

The floor/bottom shelves in the dry storage area has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. PIC will sanitize in 2 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
Refrigerator and milk cooler door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

The walls in the dish machine area are in poor repair. Peeling paint was observed at the time of inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/31/2024

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023
Milk cooler gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2023
The facility is lacking a 3 bay sink. A sink with at least 3 compartments shall be provided for manually washing, rinsing, and sanitizing equipment and utensils. New Violation. Correct By: 09/16/2023
The kitchen hood fins have an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2023
Paint observed peeling and chipping by dishmachine. Physical facilities to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2023
